agent_reasoning: **Strategy:** I dropped the tree-redundant `PolynomialFeatures` and `KBinsDiscretizer` layers that create noisy, high-dimensional inputs for LightGBM, replaced the slow `KNNImputer` with median imputation paired with `MissingIndicator` flags to preserve the signal of missingness, and added dataset-agnostic pandas string-meta features (length, word count, digit count) together with rare-category grouping—allowing the model to exploit raw text structure and high-cardinality columns without overfitting.
